markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Q1 content strategy and resolve operational questions.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The content strategy is shifting to an AE-focused narrative, positioning Outreach as an "AI revenue workflow platform" for CROs.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**New Listicle Process:** A new process will accelerate listicle production by centralizing review in a single doc, which Outreach will then split into 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** AI-generated images are a "0-to-1" process; minor edits are impossible, so Outreach will request full regeneration for any issues.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Website Structure Validated:** The current AI agent hub-and-spoke model is confirmed as the correct SEO approach for handling a roadmap of \~30 agents.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Strategic Pivot: AE-Focused Narrative

  - [**New Narrative:** Shift from an SDR tool to an "AI revenue workflow platform" for CROs.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Core Message:** Position Outreach as AI that "asks and then acts for you," not a simple chatbot.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Align all content with this narrative, using themes like:](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [AE workflows & productivity](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Forecasting & deal execution](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Pipeline inspection & conversational intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Supporting Materials:** GrowthX requested internal docs (e.g., product matrices) to ensure messaging accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Content Operations & Workflow

  - [**Listicle Production:** A new process will accelerate production.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [GrowthX will deliver a single doc containing 5 listicle outlines.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [Outreach will review it with PMMs and Maggie before splitting it into 5 separate articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Competitor Links:** The team will use no-follow links to G2 or competitor sites to cite information without legal risk.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**AI Image Workflow:** The image generation process is a "0-to-1" function.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Minor edits (e.g., moving elements, changing text) are not possible.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Solution:** For any issues, Outreach will request a full image regeneration.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Listicle Images:** GrowthX can use vector logos for a more on-brand look.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Website Structure: AI Agents

  - [**Problem:** The current AI agent hub-and-spoke model is effective but raises UX/SEO concerns as the agent roadmap grows to \~30.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Solution:** The current structure is the correct SEO approach.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [**Hub Page:** Ranks for broad terms (e.g., "AI agents").](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [**Individual Pages:** Rank for specific agent terms (e.g., "Research Agent").](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [**Navigation:** Avoid adding all agents to the main nav.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
          - [**Recommendation:** Use a category dropdown or footer links for key agents.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** SEO content will continue to link to agent "money pages" to drive traffic and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Q1 Content & SEO Initiatives

  - [**LLM Visibility Experiment:** GrowthX is developing a controlled experiment to improve content visibility in AI Overviews and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [**Goal:** Test one variable at a time to measure its impact.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
      - [**Timeline:** More details will be shared in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Upcoming Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**February Flagship Content:** A major piece (e.g., e-book) using proprietary Outreach Insights data.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**February 16 Product Launch:** Content will support a new agent or feature release.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Year-End Review:** A "Spotify Wrapped" style piece using BI metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**CRM Content:** This is a lower priority than the new AE-focused narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [Deliver the 5-in-1 listicle doc for review.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [Regenerate AI images per feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Outreach:**](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [Share the listicle doc with PMMs and Maggie for review.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [Provide internal docs (product matrices) to support the new AE narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [Share details on the Feb 16 product launch when available.](https://fathom.video/share/_5_EPesbEhYrx8XbQP9KtRNLoZrvytEA?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
